violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice bin at the drive-thru window) were observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

Tongs observed stored on an unclean surface (inside chest freezer on the bottom with food debris) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the freezer and chest freezer have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2026
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements as it relates to the proper cleaning and sanitizing of equipment and surfaces. Procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the broiler, chest freezer, prep tables have an accumulation of food residue, yellow residue, and other debris. PIC informed that equipment and surfaces are to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The floors in the food prep and broiler area have an accumulation of soil residue, yellow residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
Onions were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
Non-food grade containers (plastic laundry baskets) were being used to store onions in the walk-in cooler and 2 door freezer unit. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
Walk-in cooler door was in poor repair. Observed top of door being held together with tape. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Hot hold units 2. Shelving 3. Prep units 4. Low boys New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, old rodent droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2024
